summary: Add tenant-occupied listing exclusion to the live results, totals, and enriched-search workflows.
reason: Student-rental screening needs an operator-safe way to drop listings already rented or sold with tenant occupancy, and the live results page now exposes enough card-level evidence to do that reliably.
validated_outcome: The new --exclude-tenanted flag removes listings visibly tagged or described as rented from live results, totals, and shortlist enrichment, with fixture coverage and live smoke verification.
